sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient ROM for N=16 FFT angles.
sub_modules.fft16_complex_mult: Combinational fixed-point complex twiddle multiplier supporting FFT and IFFT conjugate modes.
sub_modules.fft16_butterfly: Combinational radix-2 DIT butterfly that rotates the second input and computes sum and difference outputs.
